findings.description: The knowledge file adds a closing `}` brace for the class `RM11AC0101Action` that does not exist in the source code block. The source ends after the closing `}` of the `validate()` method without a class-closing brace.
findings.source_evidence:
Source code block ends with `return validationContext.createObject();
     }` — no subsequent class-closing `}` is present.
